# Heat pump quotes

## Vaillant

The Vaillant aroTHERM quote from March 2025 covers supply and install of a
7kW unit at £11,400 including cylinder.

| Item | Cost |
|------|------|
| Unit | £6,200 |
| Install | £3,800 |
| Cylinder | £1,400 |

## Mitsubishi

Ecodan quote pending a site survey. Notes from the call:

```text
- survey booked 2025-04-02
- needs 3-phase check
- #not-a-heading inside fence
```

# Decision

Leaning Vaillant on price and installer availability.
